description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:alpine Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define a deploy stage with a publish job that runs npm install in a before_script, then echoes "//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=$NPM_AUTH_TOKEN" > ~/.npmrc and executes npm publish --tag latest. Configure the job to run only on the master branch and on tags, and to be excluded for trigger pipelines. Use the NPM_AUTH_TOKEN secret variable for authentication.
